allow: PowerShell(try { $j = Get-Content record.json -Raw -Encoding UTF8 | ConvertFrom-Json; Write-Output "JSON valid" } catch { Write-Output "JSON invalid: $_" })
PowerShell(try { Get-Content record.json -Raw -Encoding UTF8 | ConvertFrom-Json | Out-Null; Write-Output "JSON valid" } catch { Write-Output "JSON invalid: $_" })
